data.title: CarMax pushes digital, plugs into used electronic vehicle market
data.description: CarMax’s digital tools now support 80% of its retail transactions. Its customer satisfaction scores have reached record levels since launching its digital platform nationwide.

data.title: KKR takes a stake in ecommerce distributor SupplyHouse
data.description: SupplyHouse employs 1,200 people and offers over 250,000 SKUs from more than 500 brands.

data.title: Back-to-school shopping trends earlier in 2025
data.description: Citing tariffs, overall supply chain concerns and higher prices, consumers have been doing their back-to-school spending earlier this year and spreading out their purchases.

data.title: Estée Lauder appoints a chief digital and marketing officer
data.description: The appointment reflects Estée Lauder’s strategic focus on strengthening its consumer-centric marketing and enhancing its digital presence across its portfolio of prestige beauty brands.

data.title: Tata Chemicals adopts an AI platform to tighten procurement controls
data.description: Key features of the system include AI-based spend classification, automated audit checks, and predictive insights aimed at optimizing vendor management and purchasing patterns.
